summary: Washing Out of Training: Any event that results

mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 033 > factions > Washing Out of Training: Any event that results
mechanics.excerpt: Washing Out of Training: Any event that results washing out of training means that the character failed warrior training because of some fault or shortcoming_ character can also vol: untarily leave training; with the same effects_ The results vary depending on the character'$ status If the character washes out of the Trueborn Creche, he or she moves o to Stage 2_ Clan Apprenticeship Path: If the character washes out of Sibko (either trueborn or freeborn), she gains the Stigma / Failed Warrior Trait and moves on to Stage 3 as Clan civilian.
